feed.title: SkillsLLM

author.name: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

feed.subtitle: AI tooling news and guides: SkillsLLM, Desktop Commander, Model Context Protocol, FastMCP, ClaudePluginHub, MCP Servers blog, Claude Skills Hub, and Glama (blog + release notes)

entry.title: orchestra
entry.content: Governance-first specialist skill framework for routed, auditable AI coding workflows.

entry.title: kf-skills
entry.content: Repository-local skills whose names start with kf-

entry.title: swarmdo
entry.content: Enterprise AI agent orchestration plugin with 150+ commands, 74+ specialized agents, SPARC methodology, swarm coordination, GitHub integration, and neural training capabilities

entry.title: cpa
entry.content: Audit Economico's books for correctness and US GAAP conformance — tie out the statements and surface misstatements, misclassifications, missing accruals, and control gaps as ranked findings with evidence and the correcting entry. Read-only.

entry.title: agent-sop-local-mcp
entry.content: Agent Standard Operating Procedures をローカル MCP サーバーとして提供するプロジェクト（kai-kou/claude-code-base 由来のルール・スキル・エージェント・フックを採用）。

entry.title: claude-init
entry.content: Make any repo AI-native. Analyzes your codebase and generates a complete Claude Code configuration — agents, skills, rules, and hooks tailored to your stack.

entry.title: review-buddy
entry.content: AI-assisted narrative code review for Claude Code — an agent reads your PR, writes a Prologue, and segments it into risk-rated Chapters you walk through in the browser.

entry.title: hr-wellbeing
entry.content: Help HR business partners, wellbeing program managers, and people leaders understand, design, and run employee wellbeing, mental health, and work-life balance initiatives. Use when asked to "design a wellbeing program", "run a burnout risk assessment", "build a mental health support plan", "design a flexible work policy", "respond to a wellbeing crisis", "measure employee wellbeing", "design a return-to-work plan after burnout leave", or any employee wellbeing, mental health, and work-life balance task.

entry.title: sonarcloud-security-triaging
entry.content: Analyze SonarCloud security issues and suggest triage decisions (SAFE/FIXED/wontfix/falsepositive) with explanations. Use when reviewing security issues or making triage decisions.

entry.title: nabu-claude
entry.content: Nabu-claude — личный ИИ-Совет для всех сфер жизни внутри Claude Code: 74 агента (9 министров, специалисты, конвейер) как субагенты; адъютант-оркестратор + 3 доменных skill-пака (marketing/product/sales). Локальный standalone-стек (docker, zero-config), workspace ~/nabu, проактивные задачи, самоулучшение (Commons).

entry.title: gaslighter
entry.content: Requirement completeness checker — nudges Claude to re-read the original request before finishing code changes.

entry.title: viator-mcp
entry.content: MCP server for the Viator Partner API — search tours and activities, product details, availability schedules, attractions, and destinations

entry.title: coding-development
entry.content: Staff-level engineering discipline: 12 domain skills, 7 agents, PM orchestration (pm / pressure-test / retro), and deterministic hook gates. Components auto-discover from skills/, agents/, commands/, hooks/ — do not re-add explicit component arrays here (they drift; disk is the source of truth).

entry.title: ceilidhboy-skills
entry.content: ceilidhboy-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: ospec-workflow
entry.content: Spec-Driven Development workflow for VS Code Agent Customization with OpenSpec, strict TDD, phase agents, skills, hooks, and verification contracts.

entry.title: toughtongue
entry.content: Create, refine, and analyze ToughTongue AI voice-agent scenarios — sales roleplays, cold calls, coaching sessions — through the ToughTongue MCP server.

entry.title: ux-agent-skills
entry.content: Audit, spec, design, and ship production-grade experiences for humans and agents alike.

entry.title: easywork
entry.content: 33-skill AI-assisted development workflow ecosystem covering the full SDLC: requirements, implement, review, test, retro, interview prep, and more. Point-Line-Net three-tier orchestration.

entry.title: telegram
entry.content: cc-bridge — drive Claude Code from Telegram. Built-in access control; manage pairing, allowlists, and policy via /telegram:access.

entry.title: qiongli-political-economy
entry.content: Political economy workflow for institutions, mechanisms, distribution, and comparative political-economic analysis.

entry.title: cost-oriented-agentic-workflow
entry.content: Token-economy agentic workflow for Claude Code: Opus plans, routes, and adjudicates; a Sonnet subagent does the token-heavy writing; independent Sonnet reviewers gate quality by risk; the controller stays lean. Standard and production modes.

entry.title: expo
entry.content: Official Expo skills for building, deploying, upgrading, and debugging Expo apps

entry.title: keel
entry.content: Keel — an AI fractional-CTO advisor for product builders who don't have a senior technical voice in the room. Eight skills across the founder journey: first-build-scope, feature-decision, tech-evaluation, architecture-review, deep-review (repo-aware four-lens flagship), enterprise-ready, estimate-check, investor-dd-prep — plus a per-project decision ledger (.keel/) that remembers decisions, assumptions, and revisit-triggers across sessions. Grounded in the persona at cto-persona.md; frameworks load on demand via frameworks/INDEX.md; prescribes first-party tools instead of rebuilding them (ecosystem-tools.md).

entry.title: ace
entry.content: AI Connect Engine — orchestrates the ACE lifecycle from idea through app building, Connect setup, LLO management, and closeout

entry.title: brain-memory
entry.content: Brain by AIVM — governed persistent memory for Claude Code. Auto-recall on session start, ACL-filtered recall per prompt, session wrap + sync on exit; every access recorded to a tamper-evident ledger.

entry.title: code-goblin-pro
entry.content: Riley's personal collection of agent skills and resources.

entry.title: grafana-dashboard-builder
entry.content: Design, generate, preview, and quality-grade Grafana dashboards as code with the Grafana Foundation SDK and Playwright. Includes a rubric-based quality and taste critic.

entry.title: creatorwood-sushidata-gtm
entry.content: Sushidata is a context data lake for long-term AI memory. This plugin turns Claude into a Sushidata-native agent: ingest community signals from Discord, Slack, and forums; run GTM prospecting and outbound with HeyReach, Hunter, and Apify; build competitor battlecards for PMMs; analyze campaign performance with research swarms; discover ICP signals from won/lost account data; and generate personalized outreach copy. Every finding is saved to the Sushidata context lake so future sessions have full memory of what was learned.

entry.title: sap-table-field-remediator
entry.content: Scan custom ECC ABAP for data access on tables/fields that change in an S/4HANA brownfield conversion, classify each finding by remediation complexity (T1/T2/T3), route it with a deterministic safety guard, and emit remediation-report.json. Ships a page-cited Simplification-List knowledge base over MCP for fix derivation.

entry.title: dev-workflow
entry.content: Standalone, à-la-carte skills from the dev-workflow pipeline: minimalism, search-first, simplification, verification, security review, and more.

entry.title: agent-harness
entry.content: Portable AI agent harness — curated review/build/test agents, secret-hardening + worktree + plan-gate hooks, and supervise/wrap/verify-completion skills. Install once, use in every project. AI-agnostic core (Claude Code / Codex / Gemini).

entry.title: world-cup-picks-report
entry.content: Generate Harbor-backed FIFA World Cup scoreline reports from expert picks, model probabilities, market consensus, Elo ratings, lineup checks, and knockout penalty-risk analysis.

entry.title: autoharness
entry.content: Per-symbol maintenance optimizer for an agent's skill layer — learns skills from real runs and keeps them by adherence in use, not by an offline eval score.

entry.title: paraqualis-gxp
entry.content: Life-sciences regulatory & computer-system-validation toolkit for Claude Code — GAMP 5, 21 CFR Part 11, EU GMP Annex 11, the live eCFR, openFDA, and an IQ/OQ/PQ qualification engine (/qualify:build, /qualify:requirements, /qualify:review). Commands, skills, sub-agents, and a document-protection hook. Run /openfda:setup once to provision a free personal openFDA API key (one minute, raises rate limits ~1,000 → ~120,000 requests/day).

entry.title: fzf-mcp
entry.content: Fuzzy-find (fzf) tools (fzf-mcp server).

entry.title: garymike-skills
entry.content: A growing collection of practical Agent Skills. Currently: github-profile (design, build, and deploy a GitHub profile README) and github-security-audit (audit and harden GitHub account and repositories).

entry.title: xentral-connector
entry.content: Xentral Agent OS — connector and skills.

entry.title: journal
entry.content: Capture development history into an immutable, dated journal - decisions, research verdicts, tombstones, lessons, external sources, session summaries, reminders, drafts, and execution plans.

entry.title: firefox-devtools-mcp
entry.content: Control Firefox for browsing, web testing, and debugging. Fill forms, capture network and console activity, take screenshots, run scripts, and profile performance. Supports Android devices.

entry.title: dependabot-reviewer
entry.content: Review, verify, and fix Dependabot and ospo-renovate PRs across all GitHub hosts. /dependabot-review approves safe updates and sets automerge. /dependabot-verify reports PR status read-only. /dependabot-fix fixes a single selected PR or broken main-branch CI interactively — analyses autonomously, proposes a repair plan, and executes after user confirmation.

entry.title: keel
entry.content: Foundation-first autonomous build workflow for Claude Code: spec the foundation, build feature-by-feature, gate every milestone with independent verification and a commit-pinned record. Stack-neutral — each project derives its own verification profile.

entry.title: palladius-public-goodies
entry.content: (💛) Riccardo's public Antigravity plugins and agent skills for inspiration.

entry.title: sema
entry.content: Content-addressed vocabulary protocol — shared meaning for AI agents

entry.title: tms-pipeline
entry.content: An opinionated AI-agent delivery pipeline: staged skills from ticket to review gate, with 04b loop review, multi-agent mob implementation, severity-rated gap audit, cost-tiered escort profiles, and guaranteed follow-up/launch capture.

entry.title: tiered-development
entry.content: Multi-tier model delegation for Claude Code: the Opus coordinator brainstorms a rough plan with you, then chooses the model tier for each slice (or a Sonnet composer picks) — Opus/Fable architects refine and review, Opus builders write substantive code, Sonnet handles mechanical edits/research/verification, and Haiku the menial work. Fable is the premium tier, spent sparingly. A fresh agent per task, each with a clean context. Ships six agents, a gated coordination skill, and three helper workflows (design-panel, execute-wave, review-panel).

entry.title: scribe
entry.content: per-project・Claude Code ネイティブの実装 administrator(ユーザー代理 AI)プラグイン。substrate(cc-session/beads/doobidoo)を compose し、spawn/監視/gate/role 別文脈注入を担う orchestration 層。v0 = 堀なし軽量モード(成文化 + 道具 + 3 role SessionStart 注入)。

entry.title: tl-telar
entry.content: Agentic engineering framework for cross-platform apps: mobile (React Native, Flutter), web (Astro, Next.js, TanStack), Rust services, and desktop - 46 agents, 116 skills, 23 commands, 4 hooks, 7 rules, 29 scripts

entry.title: cybersec-toolkit
entry.content: 872 on-demand security skills for CTF, pentest, bug bounty, DFIR, detection engineering, cloud, identity, and red/blue team work. Skills are plain Markdown and activate by task without permanently consuming context. Bundles vendored skills under mixed licenses (MIT, Apache-2.0, CC-BY-SA-4.0) — see per-source attribution in .claude/skills/SKILLS.md.

entry.title: tdder
entry.content: Guides AI agents through disciplined coding practices. Language and build-system agnostic core with extensible language/build skills.

entry.title: claude-skills
entry.content: Personal user-scope Claude Code skills. PKI/ops runbooks: internal-ca (2-tier PKI bootstrap with Vault, OCSP, CRL, Ansible deploy), mtls (server-trusts-client mutual TLS on top of internal-ca), lxd-claude-setup (provision Claude Code on a headless LXD/Linux server). Bare-metal Kubernetes family: k8s-bare-metal (kubeadm + Calico + Longhorn + Rancher, single-node/HA/join, checkpoint-resume), harbor-registry (private Harbor registry with self-signed CA), cicd-platform (Argo CD + self-hosted GitHub Actions runners). MJBL mTLS platform suite (the live deployed ecosystem on this host, indexing the /home/mjbl/* runbooks as source-of-truth): mjbl-mtls-platform, mjbl-ca-operations, mjbl-enrollment-plane, mjbl-client-provisioning, mjbl-cert-lifecycle, mjbl-operator-portal, mjbl-mtls-troubleshooting. Slash commands: /k8s-setup, /harbor-setup, /cicd-setup, and the MJBL suite under /mjbl:mtls:* (platform, ca, enroll, client, cert, portal, troubleshoot, issue-server). MJBL Kubernetes estate suite (the live multi-cluster topology — production rkek8s, the facility/ArgoCD cluster, UAT, and DR — kubeconfigs, MetalLB, ArgoCD external-cluster deploys, and the kubectl-apply DR tooling): mjbl-k8s-platform, mjbl-k8s-production, mjbl-k8s-facility, mjbl-k8s-dr, under /mjbl:k8s:* (platform, prod, facility, dr).

entry.title: gemini-manager
entry.content: Enables Claude Code to manage Gemini CLI as an intern. Claude acts as manager/architect while Gemini does all coding work.

entry.title: foldkit-skills
entry.content: Skills for building Foldkit apps — app generator, message scaffolding, submodel extraction, and architecture auditing

entry.title: onehome-mcp
entry.content: OneHome (CoreLogic) real-estate access for Claude — your agent-shared portal listings, property details, photos, schools, saved searches

entry.title: conductor
entry.content: Spec-Driven Development Orchestration Plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: prism
entry.content: Whole-repo code navigation (the prism-mcp server) plus defect-focused diff slicing, packaged for coding agents. Pre-wires the prism MCP server to the current project and ships two Agent Skills (prism-code-navigation, prism-code-slicing) that teach an agent when and how to use them.

entry.title: whatsapp-claude-channel
entry.content: WhatsApp channel for Claude Code — linked-device messaging bridge with built-in access control. Manage pairing, allowlists, and policy via /whatsapp-claude-channel:access.

entry.title: helium-mcp
entry.content: Remote MCP server for news bias (37 dimensions), live market data, and ML options pricing.

entry.title: vibe-insights
entry.content: Vibe Insights — the deep retrospective for your Claude Code work. Coverage, where-was-I recall, token/cost (incl. the cache reveal), trends, how-you-work, ranked open threads, decisions, languages, per-session friction/satisfaction/outcome, and a synthesized narrative read. Across your full history and every machine you code on. Personal by default; optionally keep chosen sources or repos local-only. No telemetry, all local. MCP-agnostic decisions overlay.

entry.title: beagle
entry.content: Code review skills and verification workflows for Python, Go, React, and AI frameworks

entry.title: tinker
entry.content: Skills for fine-tuning language models with the Tinker API — research, debugging, and more.

entry.title: claudna
entry.content: Curated Claude Code skills, agents, and hooks — the canonical capability set of the Claudfather ecosystem.

entry.title: nz-skills
entry.content: Community-contributed AI skills for New Zealand public data — LINZ, Stats NZ, Auckland Transport, GeoNet, weather, fuel prices, electricity, retail pricing, transport, and more. Drop-in read-only connectors to real NZ infrastructure and datasets.

entry.title: conduct-cli
entry.content: Conduct AI CLI — run agents, manage workspaces, and enforce AI usage policies with ConductGuard MCP. Includes conduct, conductguard-mcp, and conduct-mcp binaries.

entry.title: esequiel378-skills
entry.content: esequiel378-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: ai-skills
entry.content: Benjamin's collection of Claude Code skills — daily workflow, code quality, dev tools, and specialist agents.

entry.title: twingate-assistant
entry.content: Twingate ZTNA implementation assistant — architecture, deployment, IaC, troubleshooting. Use this plugin whenever working with Twingate, zero trust network access, or any of: connectors, remote networks, resources, security policies, identity providers, device trust, DNS filtering, exit networks, the Twingate API, Twingate Terraform provider, Twingate Pulumi provider, Twingate Kubernetes operator, Twingate gateway, or SSH PAM.

entry.title: weight-loss-skill
entry.content: AI-powered weight loss coaching suite — onboarding, meal tracking, daily reminders, and goal planning. All data stored locally, fully private.

entry.title: audiobook-organizer
entry.content: Expert Claude Code assistance for the audiobook-organizer codebase — shared context loading, Go/DB/docs/PII specialist agents.

entry.title: claude-skills-templates
entry.content: Work lifecycle pipeline, doc contract enforcement, and skill authoring workbench for Claude Code

entry.title: octo
entry.content: v9.44.1 — Patch release for Gemini environment/version detection and qwen auth gating. Run /octo:setup.

entry.title: odin
entry.content: ODIN (Outline Driven INtelligence) - Advanced code agent with diagram-first engineering and atomic commit workflows for surgical precision in software development

entry.title: mcp-oda
entry.content: Integration with Oda for searching products and managing your shopping cart.

entry.title: codelens
entry.content: Host-adaptive code-intelligence MCP for Claude/Codex-style harnesses — hybrid semantic retrieval, index-health checks, and mutation-gated refactoring.

entry.title: finplan
entry.content: Personal finance projection engine — Monte Carlo projections, tax calculations, retirement planning, Social Security analysis, and interactive dashboards. Powered by 60+ MCP tools.

entry.title: cpp-lsp
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for C/C++ development with clangd LSP integration, 14 automated hooks for compilation, linting (clang-tidy), formatting (clang-format), and memory analysis (valgrind)

entry.title: ctoc
entry.content: Your Virtual CTO — 60 AI agents. 265 expert skills. 15 quality gates.

entry.title: agentforce-mobile-sdk-react-native
entry.content: Integrate the Agentforce Mobile SDK into a React Native app via the @salesforce/react-native-agentforce bridge. Walks consumers through use-case discovery, picks the right configuration mode (Service Agent for public/customer-facing, Employee Agent for signed-in workforce), wires the bridge package and native iOS/Android dependencies, and scaffolds TypeScript files for AgentforceService configuration, logger/navigation/view-provider delegates, and a launch button.

entry.title: shaon
entry.content: Rust CLI and Claude Code skill for personal attendance, payslip, salary, and related self-service tasks on the user's own Hilan account.

entry.title: Bridge
entry.content: Go backend + Next.js frontend

entry.title: app-store-connect
entry.content: App Store Connect tools for Claude — apps, TestFlight, customer reviews, sales/finance reports, and team users via MCP

entry.title: pensmith
entry.content: Structured research-and-drafting assistant for academic papers — verifies every citation against the live source.

entry.title: ryangannon-skills
entry.content: ryangannon-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: mtk
entry.content: MTK (Moberg Toolkit) — AI-assisted development toolkit with pluggable tech stacks (.NET, Python, TypeScript). Language-agnostic workflow skills, review agents, and compliance-first workflows.

entry.title: hotl
entry.content: Human-on-the-Loop operating model: skills, workflows, and adapters for AI-native development

entry.title: nova
entry.content: Build, edit, compile, and deploy CommCare apps from Claude Code

entry.title: deepeval
entry.content: Skills for adding DeepEval evaluations, tracing, datasets, Confident AI reports, and iterative improvement loops to AI applications.

entry.title: hmd
entry.content: Nothing ships unproven. Heimdall is an autonomous multi-agent orchestrator for Claude Code that turns one prompt into a finished project — and keeps moving the bar on what counts as done: every plan wires an external, falsifiable oracle so the implementation can never grade its own homework, and the merge stays blocked until the work is proven correct. Decomposes work, spawns parallel agents, enforces quality gates with CTO-level judgment. Live observability via a terminal-native HUD statusline and end-of-run summary card.

entry.title: claude-toolkit
entry.content: Commands, agents, scripts, and hooks for Claude Code development workflows

entry.title: github-actions-docker-build-push
entry.content: Reusable GitHub Actions workflow for building and pushing Docker images to ECR or GHCR. Used together with iac-platform skill for CI/CD pipelines.

entry.title: roadmap
entry.content: Roadmap + backlog graph (PIs → sprints, deps, priorities, session estimates) with deterministic, disk/CPU/RAM-checked multi-session fanout. YAML is the source of truth; SLICES.md/BACKLOG.md are generated. Orient with /slice, capture erratic work with /backlog, refresh with /sync, bootstrap with /init, fan out concurrent sessions with /fanout.

entry.title: signupgenius-mcp
entry.content: SignUpGenius MCP server for Claude — read sign-ups, slot reports, and groups; add group members. Three auth paths: Pro API key, email/password, or sign in via the fetchproxy browser extension.

entry.title: mind
entry.content: Claude Mind - Give Claude photographic memory in ONE portable file. Share, version, and transfer your Claude's brain.

entry.title: zola
entry.content: Zola wedding planning tools for Claude — vendors, budget, guests, seating, events, registry, inquiries, and more via MCP

entry.title: cc-skills-sdlc
entry.content: SDLC skills for Claude Code — architecture, planning, code quality, testing, review, and documentation.

entry.title: trace-mcp
entry.content: Framework-aware code intelligence MCP server. 60+ framework integrations, 81 languages, semantic search with Signal Fusion (BM25 + PageRank + embeddings + identity), refactoring tools (rename/move/extract/codemod), change-impact analysis, security scanning, and decision/session memory.

entry.title: maia-skill
entry.content: Finance.ia — Multi-agent investment analysis system for market research, portfolio recommendations, and interactive reporting across crypto, stocks, forex, and commodities.

entry.title: canvas-parent-mcp
entry.content: Canvas LMS (Instructure) MCP server for Claude — courses, grades, assignments, announcements, planner, conversations, files

entry.title: gaia
entry.content: Security-first multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code. Agents span the full lifecycle; commands are risk-classified — reads run free, state changes need approval, irreversible ops blocked.

entry.title: ml-odyssey-skills
entry.content: Skills migrated to ProjectMnemosyne for cross-project reuse

entry.title: clawbio
entry.content: Bioinformatics-native AI agent skill library — pharmacogenomics, ancestry, scRNA-seq, metagenomics, variant annotation, genome comparison, and more. 24 skills with deterministic Python execution, reproducibility bundles, and local-first privacy.

entry.title: lichao689-skills
entry.content: lichao689-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: jtennant-agent-config
entry.content: John Tennant shared Claude Code skills and config

entry.title: apple-photos
entry.content: Query and export from the macOS Apple Photos library via osxphotos - search by date/album/keyword/person, list albums and folders, fetch metadata, and export originals or edited photos (macOS only)

entry.title: cc-skills-golang
entry.content: AI Agent Skills for production-ready Go projects

entry.title: kosh
entry.content: Testing system for WordPress sites — functional, performance, and accessibility tests via Playwright MCP

entry.title: rust-lsp
entry.content: Rust language server

entry.title: dwe
entry.content: Navigator skill for DWE projects — a Docker-based developer environment manager. Activates when working in a project containing `workspace.yml`.

entry.title: cc-transcript
entry.content: Investigate Claude Code transcripts token-efficiently via the cc-transcript CLI: list, stats, grep, and show instead of reading raw JSONL.

entry.title: agentic-starter-kits-skills
entry.content: Claude Code skills for agentic-starter-kits contributors.

entry.title: daytona
entry.content: Creates and manages isolated cloud sandboxes (secure code execution environments with dedicated runtimes) on the Daytona platform

entry.title: aicoach-framework
entry.content: Multi-agent AI coach for endurance & strength athletes — runs entirely inside Claude Code.

entry.title: dotagents
entry.content: Cross-agent skill library and subagent roles: cmux, tg, jobs, repo-eval, spawn, spec, grill-me, and more.

entry.title: seldonframe
entry.content: Build, deploy, and sell AI agents for local-service businesses — from your IDE. One command creates a live hosted workspace on *.app.seldonframe.com: website, booking page, intake form, CRM, and an AI receptionist, in about 3 minutes. No signup, no key for your first workspace. Set SELDONFRAME_API_KEY later to unlock more workspaces, custom domains, and marketplace selling.

entry.title: gueridon
entry.content: Mobile web UI for Claude Code — setup, status, and management. Requires: Node.js, Tailscale

entry.title: apple-mail
entry.content: Manage Apple Mail through natural language - read, search, send, and organize emails (macOS only)

entry.title: axhub
entry.content: Korean-first Claude Code plugin for axhub. onboarding/bootstrap/deploy/import/development/diagnosis/clarity/update 8개 스킬이 ax-hub-cli v0.20.0+ 표면(hidden plugin-support 그룹 + 공개 deploy verify·diagnose·update)을 직접 호출해요. update 는 사전 안내 문장 없이 `현재 버전을 확인할게요.` 로 바로 시작해요. import 는 기존 로컬 앱 가져오기를, diagnosis 는 배포 실패 원인 요약을 담당하고, preview-confirm 배포와 verify 기반 성공 선언을 제공해요.

entry.title: frontend-skills
entry.content: React/TypeScript frontend + Go backend enforcement harness. 98 wired hooks across 108 scripts enforce patterns on every edit. Green != done: `test-warning-check` hard-blocks warnings on passing test/lint/type runs (DeprecationWarning, React `act()`, unhandled rejection, `@ts-ignore`); `ci-warning-audit` Stop-hook scans `gh run view --log` on green CI for deprecations / console warnings / skipped tests. 88 skills from TDD through CI-green PR, including /aip protobuf API design, /prime startup briefs, /thermo-nuclear-code-quality-review release-blocking PR audits, /resilience-review resilience checks, /steelman anti-sycophancy guard, /upgrade-dependency safe dependency upgrades, and /snyk-ux-security per-path vuln sweep (JS + Go ecosystems; exploitability-triage first gate via `bun why`/`go mod why`/`govulncheck`; top-level direct dep bump first, parent dep bump second, resolutions/overrides/replace as last resort only with follow-up TODO to remove; React 18 pin + changelog-walked major bumps + no-deferral escalation; Go `snyk test --file=go.mod` + `go get -u` + `go mod tidy` + `govulncheck` verify). Session exit blocked while PR review threads remain unresolved. TypeScript escape hatches blocked at Edit. tsconfig strictness weakening blocked. Worktree isolation + branch safety hook-enforced. bun.lock + yarn.lock parity enforced (Snyk IO doesn't parse bun.lock). 21 LLM failure modes enforced: 7 Karpathy single-agent + 14 MAST multi-agent (Cemri et al. NeurIPS 2025). OWASP + STRIDE subset + snyk/bun audit. Core Web Vitals perf gate. MCP ban with CLI redirect (~20x token savings). Agent-browser wrap (~91% token reduction for AI browsing). 3-hat plan review (product/engineering/design). 9 agents (adds plan hats + karpathy reference), 5 routines. Opus 4.7 tuned, POSIX-friendly.

entry.title: event-machine
entry.content: EventMachine — Laravel state machines with event sourcing, parallel states, delegation, timers, and HTTP routing. Ships with full documentation (87 pages) and curated agent cheat-sheets.

entry.title: artsonia-mcp
entry.content: MCP server for Artsonia — natural-language access to student-art portfolios, comments, and fans

entry.title: jk
entry.content: GitHub CLI-style interface for Jenkins controllers - create multibranch jobs, inspect config.xml, and manage runs, logs, artifacts, credentials, nodes, and queues

entry.title: cks
entry.content: 5-phase feature lifecycle toolkit — discover, design, sprint, review, release. Includes Stitch MCP design integration, 11-element discovery, iteration loops, quality gates, and environment promotion. From idea to production.

entry.title: grimoire
entry.content: Knowledge base builder — scouts sources, compiles wiki articles, generates study frontends, serves via MCP

entry.title: starknet-agentic-skills
entry.content: Canonical Starknet skill bundle for AI agents: wallets, DeFi, identity, payments, privacy, and Cairo contract workflows.

entry.title: autumn
entry.content: Domain knowledge, CLI wrappers, scaffolding commands, and code review for the autumn-web Rust framework

entry.title: farty-bobo
entry.content: Opinionated Claude Code skills, hooks, and commands. Use /farty-bobo:install to selectively install what you want without cloning the whole repo.

entry.title: omics-skills
entry.content: Bioinformatics, literature discovery, scientific writing, and data visualization agents and skills for Claude Code and Cowork.

entry.title: mureo
entry.content: Your local-first AI ad ops crew for Google Ads, Meta Ads, Search Console & GA4. mureo sits on top of the official ad-platform MCPs, gates every change against your strategy, correlates outcomes locally, and keeps an auditable decision log — credentials never leave your machine.

entry.title: vercel
entry.content: Build and deploy web apps and agents

entry.title: gitguardian
entry.content: The official GitGuardian plugin for AI coding agents. Detect hardcoded secrets, plant honeytokens, and triage incidents using ggshield, the GitGuardian Developer MCP server, and the GitGuardian API.

entry.title: mathlib-quality
entry.content: Prove, clean up, golf, and bring Lean 4 code up to mathlib standards

entry.title: overture
entry.content: Session management framework for AI-assisted development. Operating documents, session discipline, work tracking, and progressive methodology evolved through 480+ production sessions.

entry.title: metaplex
entry.content: Metaplex development on Solana — NFTs, tokens, compressed NFTs, candy machines, token launches.

entry.title: universal-dev-standards
entry.content: Skills for development standards: commit messages, code review, testing, documentation, and more. Supports 25 comprehensive skills for the full development lifecycle.

entry.title: kmgraph
entry.content: Structured knowledge capture, lesson-learned documentation, and cross-session memory for Claude Code projects. Includes KG entries, ADRs, meta-issue tracking, chat extraction, and profile-file rule capture.

entry.title: yana-ai
entry.content: Personal agent operating system for Claude Code. Safety hooks, memory tiers, agents, commands, and cross-engine hard enforcement.

entry.title: open-second-brain
entry.content: Plugin-first second brain package for AI agents and humans.

entry.title: dockerfile-lsp
entry.content: Dockerfile language server plugin for Claude Code with docker-langserver integration and automated hooks for linting and best practices

entry.title: t3
entry.content: Personal code factory for multi-repo projects

entry.title: ouroboros
entry.content: Self-improving AI workflow system. Crystallize requirements before execution with Socratic interview, ambiguity scoring, and 3-stage evaluation.

entry.title: smith
entry.content: Spec-driven development for Claude Code — requirements, plans, and tasks that ship as working code.

entry.title: navigator
entry.content: Finish What You Start - Sessions that last, AI that learns, Features that ship. Context engineering + Theory of Mind + Knowledge Graph + Loop Mode + Task Mode. Features Project Knowledge Graph (unified search, experiential memory), unified workflow orchestration, auto-update on session start, ToM-based verification checkpoints, bilateral modeling, quality detection, enhanced context markers, and Loop Mode. 92% token reduction with proven strategies. Based on Riedl & Weidmann 2025 Human-AI Synergy research.

entry.title: agent-reachout
entry.content: Multi-provider notification plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: disconnected-readiness-scorer
entry.content: Score a repository's readiness for disconnected / air-gapped OpenShift deployments

entry.title: oats-skills
entry.content: Vue, Tauri, architecture, security, and MCP-debugging skills tailored to the oats desktop app.

entry.title: vd
entry.content: A daily-driver collection of skills for agentic coding, namespaced under `vd:` to avoid conflicts with other plugins.

entry.title: lattice
entry.content: Composable AI skills framework covering the full software delivery lifecycle — design, architecture, implementation, testing, and review.

entry.title: explainmyrepo
entry.content: Turn any GitHub repo into a beautiful, art-directed explainer site that takes a stranger from "I've never seen this" to "oh, I get why this matters — and I'm ready to use it." One Claude Code skill (the brain) reads the repo, builds a real RVF vector knowledge base, conceives a bespoke visual metaphor, authors the comprehension arc, generates raster + SVG visuals, assembles a responsive page on a shared design system, grades it on real pixels against a dual quality gate (>=95 on mobile and desktop), deploys it to its own URL, and ships a downloadable AI knowledge pack so the reader's AI gets it too. Pure, independently-testable tools do the mechanics; one BuildContext carries the work.

entry.title: asana
entry.content: Manage Asana from the terminal with the `asana` CLI — tasks, projects, sections, subtasks, comments, dependencies, followers, tags, attachments, custom fields, and CSV/JSON batch import.

entry.title: bgs-modding-superpowers
entry.content: Agentic superpowers for Bethesda Game Studio modpack curation: MCP-driven xEdit conflict audit, MO2 control plane, and runtime install/dev-log skills.

entry.title: go-lsp
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for Go development with gopls LSP integration, 14 automated hooks for linting (golangci-lint), formatting (gofmt), testing, and security scanning (govulncheck)

entry.title: voicemode
entry.content: Voice conversations with Claude Code using local speech-to-text and text-to-speech

entry.title: metrognome
entry.content: The autonomous performance engineer for React Native. Orchestrates metro-mcp and Callstack's agent-device, agent-react-devtools, and react-native-best-practices into one propose → measure → keep/revert loop — with an interactive 3D Perf Map, a live HTML run report, configurable commit mode, and per-repo performance memory.

entry.title: cartog
entry.content: Code graph navigation and semantic search for LLM coding agents

entry.title: tempo
entry.content: Turn a natural-language date/time problem into correct, validated Tempo (Elixir) — ISO 8601 / IXDTF representation plus relations, set algebra, recurrence, scheduling, and constraint networks — and get a plain-language answer.

entry.title: superpowers
entry.content: Core skills library for Claude Code: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques

entry.title: agent-toolkit
entry.content: A collection of project-agnostic skills for common engineering tasks such as ticket refinement, planning, code reviews, agent memory hygiene, skill authoring, and more.

entry.title: mantle
entry.content: Core Mantle SDK skills for generated sites, marketplace capabilities, theming, updates, and production handoff.

entry.title: cdp
entry.content: Structured Demolition Protocol for iteratively hardening any project specification through onboarding, critique, and integration cycles.

entry.title: commercial-legal-pl
entry.content: Polish Commercial Legal — Claude skill for drafting and reviewing contracts under Polish civil law. Focused on B2B, IP and IT contracts (body leasing, NDAs, IT implementation, SaaS, IP assignment, settlements). Built from the practice of Zurawska Piotrowski Law Firm (ktzr.pl). Use when the user asks to analyze a Polish contract, audit contract risks, generate a new agreement, edit a clause, or check contract consistency.

entry.title: linearis
entry.content: Agent skill for the linearis Linear.app CLI: preflight, discover-then-act usage protocol, JSON output, ID resolution, discussions, files.

entry.title: clawdcursor
entry.content: Safe cross-OS desktop & browser control for Claude Code — the fallback execution layer for when APIs, CLIs, and direct integrations aren't available. Registers the clawdcursor MCP server in compact mode and bundles its usage skill (the SKILL.md at the repo root). Requires Node.js 20+; the MCP server launches via npx, which fetches clawdcursor on demand (or uses your global install if present) — no separate install step.

entry.title: claudeclaw-plus
entry.content: ClaudeClaw+ — governance, orchestration, persistent memory, and hardened web UI for Claude Code daemons. Sister project to moazbuilds/claudeclaw.

entry.title: claude-phone
entry.content: Serverless P2P link between two AI-agent sessions, with event-driven receive (background watcher + Stop hook) and an optional autonomous responder.

entry.title: kube-dc
entry.content: Kube-DC — Kubernetes-native data center platform skills for managing projects, VMs, databases, clusters, networking, storage, RBAC, secrets, KMS, and certificates.

entry.title: aaron-marketing
entry.content: 120 marketing skills and 8 commands on one shared contract, arranged as a four-layer marketing operating system — Strategy (brand narrative), Channels (SEO/GEO, organic social, email, paid ads, influencer), Orchestration (product launch), and a shared Protocol layer of truth registries and memory. SEO/GEO (keyword research, content creation, technical audits, schema markup, programmatic/parasite/local SEO, site architecture, AI-traffic, monitoring), influencer marketing (audience insight, discovery, campaign planning, outreach, amplification, ROI tracking), paid ads across the ROAS loop, email marketing across the SEND loop, product launch across the RAMP loop, organic social across the ECHO loop (channel portfolio, voice dossiers, platform norm cards, calendars, platform-native creative, advocacy, social-quality audit, inbox/crisis ops, listening/SOV/dark-social measurement), and brand narrative & messaging across the TALE loop (message/positioning-truth tracing, durable message house, brand voice + naming canon, story bank, surface cascade, pitch narrative, enablement, proof packaging, the NQS gate, message testing, resonance and drift monitoring), plus a shared protocol layer (entity/creator/offer-claim/consent/launch/channel/narrative truth registries, project memory) serving all seven. Frameworks: CORE-EEAT, CITE, C3, ROAS, SEND, RAMP, ECHO, TALE.

entry.title: larch
entry.content: Multi-agent workflow automation for Claude Code: issue-anchored `/design` (one direct-drafting flow; plan-review panel), `/bug` (consumer issue-filing helper), `/deps` issue dependency audits, and `/implement` (positional `<issue-N>`, fixed 7200s Step 2 timeout, optional `--merge`, `--forked`, `--draft`, `--no-admin-fallback`, `--no-logs-commit`, `--coder`, `--run-id`). `/implement` Preflight reads the `larch:plan` block from the issue body; `/implement` Step 5 code review always uses the unified strict panel internally (public `--panel` argv removed).

entry.title: fcp-slides
entry.content: Create and edit PowerPoint presentations through semantic commands

entry.title: lr
entry.content: Lore — persistent knowledge system for AI agents

entry.title: teikk-agents-skills
entry.content: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents by 22Teikk — covering the full software development lifecycle from spec to ship.

entry.title: aurelienmaze-skills
entry.content: aurelienmaze-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: taskyou
entry.content: Install and manage TaskYou — a personal task management system with Kanban board, background AI execution, and git worktree isolation.

entry.title: keyhole
entry.content: Hand a secret to your AI coding agent through a localhost form — the value reaches a store by reference and never enters the chat context

entry.title: shikigami
entry.content: AI Agent Scrum Team：8 個專業角色 × 自治協作 × Discovery → Delivery 全週期覆蓋

entry.title: typescript-lsp
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for TypeScript/JavaScript development with vtsls LSP integration, 16 automated hooks for type checking, linting (ESLint), formatting (Prettier), testing (Jest/Vitest), and security scanning

entry.title: tesser-skills
entry.content: Agentic skills for onboarding onto and operating the Tesser Payments Platform. Includes /setup-openfx for connecting an OpenFX liquidity-provider account.

entry.title: aw-author
entry.content: Guided authoring, validation, and refinement of GitHub Agentic Workflow (gh-aw) markdown files. Includes fully autonomous daily intelligence pipeline (research, gap analysis, implementation, PR to develop), ecosystem monitoring, knowledge base management, and GitHub Discussions integration.

entry.title: ambience
entry.content: AI-assisted authoring and diagnosis for Ambience (Home Assistant) scene configuration. Bundles the ambience-author skill and the /ambience-create and /ambience-fix commands.

entry.title: skillz-claude
entry.content: D-EPCT+R workflow for Claude Code: Explore → Plan → Implement → Review → Ship. 50+ skills (planning, dev, Figma, web-navigator, design-audit, seo-geo-audit, audio/video, security, Rodin critical thinking), 30+ slash commands (/dev, /design-audit, /design-audit-squad, /seo-geo-audit, /seo-geo-squad, /rodin, /ship, /qa, /auto-dev RALPH mode), multi-agent parallel review, spec-driven workflow gates. FR-first.

entry.title: oagen
entry.content: Skills for building language emitters, extractors, and smoke tests for the oagen OpenAPI SDK generator

entry.title: antigravity
entry.content: Repository knowledge engine plugin. Bundles CLI-backed slash commands (ag-setup / ag-init / ag-refresh / ag-ask) plus the agent-repo-init skill. Works in both Claude Code and Codex CLI.

entry.title: dev-pipeline
entry.content: Multi-agent development pipeline simulating an engineering team: requirements analysis, technical design, module breakdown, TDD implementation, validation, code review, and fix cycles

entry.title: headspin-control
entry.content: HeadSpin device control for Claude Code: skills, slash commands, subagents, hooks, and a bundled MCP server (20 REST tools). Authenticate to a HeadSpin environment, enumerate and lock real devices, drive them over documented REST/Appium surfaces, and — new in 1.1 — run full capture sessions end-to-end (adb lock/shell/start/stop capture, live-validated on real devices 2026-07-03), list capture sessions, pull Waterfall issue-card reports, download session artifacts (HAR network waterfall, screen-recording MP4, device event logs), and read device time series (memory, battery, network, video-quality). Every tool is a real Bearer-REST call, live-validated against api-dev.headspin.io captured sessions on 2026-07-02 (see e2e-evidence/headspin-forge-260702/v11-report-validation/).

entry.title: trinity-vsa-framework
entry.content: Trinity VSA/FPGA development framework with custom skills, hooks, and MCP integration for ternary computing

entry.title: treko
entry.content: Browser automation for Claude Code via Treko — real Chrome control (recon, click, fill, navigate, eval, captcha handling) through the Treko HTTP API.

entry.title: cc-soul
entry.content: Persistent memory and code intelligence for Claude Code. Claude learns your preferences, remembers your codebase, anticipates your needs, and gets smarter over time. 150+ tools. Local-first. Zero configuration.

entry.title: liferay-headless
entry.content: Tools for the Liferay Headless team.

entry.title: agent-decision-record
entry.content: Structured decision-making for AI coding agents. Creates auditable Agent Decision Records (AgDR) when technical choices are made — selecting libraries, patterns, or architecture.

entry.title: marketing-pipeline
entry.content: Automated distribution pipeline for open source developer tools. Onboard a project from its README, launch to MCP Registry + directories, post to Bluesky/Dev.to/Hashnode/Mastodon, track engagement.

entry.title: openstack-k8s-agent-tools
entry.content: Development and troubleshooting tools for openstack-k8s-operators operators

entry.title: worldos
entry.content: WorldOS — simulate living, AI-generated worlds and play epic D&D 5e inside them. An AI DM generates stories live within persistent, canon-anchored worlds; deterministic 5e rules, searchable memory, a voiced AI companion, fully voice-acted.

entry.title: om-superpowers
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for Open Mercato developers — 11 user-facing skills (plus on-demand specialist references) covering the full OM lifecycle from ideation through PR review

entry.title: agent
entry.content: /launch-agent slash command — interview-driven scaffolding for the bborbe agent platform (clone template repo, generate Config CRD + vault page + scenario)

entry.title: qwlabs-skills
entry.content: qwlabs-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: tiber
entry.content: Git-backed task boards for coding agents: branch-local .tasks storage, CLI, stdio MCP, dry-run-first scaffolding with explicit approval, and read-only dashboard workflows.

entry.title: pipecrew
entry.content: PipeCrew — a multi-repo agent crew that ships features end-to-end. Discover a project (/discover), deliver a feature (/deliver), review code (/review), assess cross-repo integration (/assess), learn from runs and PRs (/learn), manage agent context (/context-refresh), and manage shared workspace memory (/memory-sync). Supports Spring Boot, React, Next.js, NestJS, FastAPI, Flask, Django, Python workers, AWS CDK, Terraform, and Node mock stacks.

entry.title: donnyclaude
entry.content: The verified workflow engine for Claude Code: durable .planning state, phased roadmaps, specialized subagents, deterministic verification gates.

entry.title: sra
entry.content: SRA — Smart Research Assistant. Full-lifecycle academic research plugin: paper ingestion, literature review, data analysis, writing, submission prep. Learns from mistakes. Answers to your name.

entry.title: youtube-watch-mcp
entry.content: Watch/read YouTube videos in Claude — clean transcripts, search, and segment any video. Keyless, no manual setup.

entry.title: shopify-embedded-app-verify
entry.content: Agentic verify loop for Shopify embedded apps — drives the real, authenticated Shopify admin in the developer's own browser via CDP.

entry.title: praetor
entry.content: Command the legion, judge the work — Claude plans, Codex executes, and a binding fresh-context judge decides what merges. Zero config.
